User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information and system settings

userId.description: The unique authenticated user ID matching request.auth.uid

email.description: The email address of the authenticated user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was provisioned

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when user profile was last updated

Screenshot.title: Screenshot Metadata
Screenshot.description: Metadata for an uploaded and processed screenshot

id.description: Unique identifier of the screenshot matchable with document ID

url.description: Public URL of the uploaded physical image file

category.description: Primary visual content category (e.g., Code, Dashboard, Social)

summary.description: AI-generated semantic summarization of the screenshot

status.description: The current OCR sync lifecycle status

users/{userId}.description: Collection of unique registered user profiles

users/{userId}/screenshots/{screenshotId.description: Screenshots collection grouped nested under the parent owner's profile
